primerSections.title: Depth
primerSections.summary: Depth changes how much tissue fits on the screen. Increase it when the target is cut off; decrease it when the target is tiny and buried in unused space.
primerSections.bestMove: Frame the target so it sits comfortably in the middle third of the image.
primerSections.pitfall: Leaving the target too shallow or too deep makes every other control harder to judge.

primerSections.title: Gain
primerSections.summary: Gain brightens or darkens the whole image. Raise it when borders disappear into darkness; lower it when everything turns milky and noisy.
primerSections.bestMove: Adjust until the target is visible without filling the frame with haze.
primerSections.pitfall: Beginners often overcorrect and wash out the margins.

primerSections.title: Contrast
primerSections.summary: Contrast separates subtle shades. It helps the learner see where the border ends and background clutter begins.
primerSections.bestMove: Use contrast after depth and gain are reasonable.
primerSections.pitfall: High gain with low contrast produces a flat image with poor edge definition.

primerSections.title: Color Doppler
primerSections.summary: Color Doppler adds flow information so the learner can flag a vessel before planning a path.
primerSections.bestMove: Turn it on when you need to decide whether a structure might be vascular.
primerSections.pitfall: Using it as the first adjustment instead of fixing framing and brightness.

primerSections.title: Calipers
primerSections.summary: Calipers give a quick measurement reference once the target edges are visible.
primerSections.bestMove: Place them only after the image is stable and the margins are clear.
primerSections.pitfall: Measuring before the border is well defined.

primerSections.title: Freeze
primerSections.summary: Freeze locks the current frame so the learner can inspect, measure, or save it.
primerSections.bestMove: Freeze once the image is framed correctly and you are ready to inspect details.
primerSections.pitfall: Trying to keep adjusting controls while the image is frozen.

primerSections.title: Save
primerSections.summary: Save captures the teaching frame after it is framed, checked, and optionally measured.
primerSections.bestMove: Use it after you confirm the image is worth keeping.
primerSections.pitfall: Saving a poor frame before verifying it.

controlLabExercises.title: Rescue 1: Bring the node into view
controlLabExercises.symptom: The target node is crowded against the top of the frame and the learner cannot see the tissue below it.
controlLabExercises.instructions: Increase depth until the node sits closer to the middle of the frame.
controlLabExercises.successMessage: Depth is now framing the target more cleanly. This is a better starting point for the rest of the scan.

controlLabExercises.title: Rescue 2: Lift the image out of the dark
controlLabExercises.symptom: The frame is undergained and the target border blends into the dark background.
controlLabExercises.instructions: Raise gain enough to reveal the target without turning the image chalky.
controlLabExercises.successMessage: Gain now reveals the border without flooding the screen with brightness.

controlLabExercises.title: Rescue 3: Separate the border from the haze
controlLabExercises.symptom: The image is bright but flat, so the target edge is difficult to distinguish from the surrounding tissue.
controlLabExercises.instructions: Increase contrast and trim gain enough to recover edge definition.
controlLabExercises.successMessage: Contrast is separating the target from the background again. The frame looks more readable.

dopplerLab.title: Color Doppler vessel check
dopplerLab.brief: This is an educational approximation only. Turn Doppler on, then decide which path avoids the color-filled vessel.
dopplerLab.prompt: Which puncture path is safest after Doppler reveals the vessel?

paths.label: Anterior path
paths.description: Cuts across the vessel once Doppler is on.

paths.label: Central path
paths.description: Passes straight through the brightest flow signal.

paths.label: Posterior-lateral path
paths.description: Angles around the vessel instead of crossing it.

quickReferenceCards.title: Depth
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: When the target is cut off or floating in too much empty space.
quickReferenceCards.whatChanges: How much anatomy fits in the vertical field.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Trying to fix a framing problem with gain.

quickReferenceCards.title: Gain
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: When the whole image is too dark or too bright.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Overgaining until the target border disappears in haze.

quickReferenceCards.title: Contrast
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: After framing and brightness are close but borders are still muddy.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Ignoring contrast when the image looks bright but flat.

quickReferenceCards.title: Color Doppler
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: When a structure could be vascular and the learner needs flow confirmation.
quickReferenceCards.whatChanges: Adds color flow information on top of the grayscale image.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Turning Doppler on before basic framing is fixed.

quickReferenceCards.title: Calipers
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: After the target edge is clear and the frame is stable.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Measuring a border that has not been optimized yet.

quickReferenceCards.title: Freeze
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: When the learner wants to inspect or measure a good frame.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Trying to keep adjusting controls on a frozen frame.

quickReferenceCards.title: Save
quickReferenceCards.whenToUse: Once the frame is worth keeping for teaching review.
quickReferenceCards.noviceTrap: Saving before checking framing, Doppler, or measurement.

assetPlaceholders.label: Mock grayscale teaching frame
assetPlaceholders.note: Current module uses rendered placeholder shapes, not a real ultrasound still.

assetPlaceholders.label: Mock Doppler overlay
assetPlaceholders.note: Current vessel signal is illustrative only and should be swapped with approved teaching art later.
